title: Portfolio Transformation & Rebuild
description: Upgraded the portfolio into a premium, world-class engineering showcase with unified design aesthetics, full CMS controls, interactive skill trees, and optimized case study showcases.
highlights: Added Blog dynamic showcase sub-pages managed entirely by CMS
Added Changelog timeline to track portfolio versions
Created dynamic engineering Case Studies for all featured projects
Upgraded skills section with an interactive visual tree diagram
Implemented floating local AI portfolio assistant

title: Interactive Search & CLI Upgrades
description: Merged a spotlight Command Palette with the terminal terminal CLI, enhancing navigation shortcuts.
highlights: Unified CMD/Ctrl+K spotlight search with Linear-style actions
Fixed CLI commands, autocomplete, and auto-typing sequencing loops

title: Premium Motion Effects
description: Integrated Framer Motion spring physics across core layout components.
highlights: Created TiltCard 3D perspective wrapper with radial glow cursor spotlights
Created MagneticButton wrappers for high-fidelity navbar link attractions

title: SuperCX Internship Showcase
description: Featured the live engineering role at SuperCX Technologies Pvt Ltd.
highlights: Added Dedicated building-status section directly above projects list
Linked current live tools and internship stack details
